brief: Today's news highlights a tick epidemic and tech giants' emissions nearing half of France, while papers explore AI for crime linkage and brain-computer interfaces in China.
news_summary: Ticks are expanding their territory, and Microsoft, Amazon, and Google's datacentre emissions are approaching half of France's total. Other top stories include Iran's top diplomat in Oman for Strait of Hormuz talks, an NHS anaesthetist shortage, and a statue for Alfred Dreyfus in Paris.
papers_summary: Research presents AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China. Other papers cover missing data visualization and traditional Chinese painting composition analysis.

en.brief: Today's news highlights a tick epidemic and tech giants' emissions nearing half of France, while papers explore AI for crime linkage and brain-computer interfaces in China.
en.news_summary: Ticks are expanding their territory, and Microsoft, Amazon, and Google's datacentre emissions are approaching half of France's total. Other top stories include Iran's top diplomat in Oman for Strait of Hormuz talks, an NHS anaesthetist shortage, and a statue for Alfred Dreyfus in Paris.
en.papers_summary: Research presents AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China. Other papers cover missing data visualization and traditional Chinese painting composition analysis.

zh.brief: 今日重点新闻包括台风巴威袭击台湾和中国大陆，造成大规模停电和撤离；德国宣判一起由华人主导的跨国性侵案。研究方面，虽然没有优先语言论文，但英文论文关注了AI在犯罪关联分析中的应用以及中国传统绘画的可视化分析。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威暴风圈进入台湾陆地，全台15万户停电，中国三地撤离逾76万人；德国宣判“德国老司机驾校”Telegram跨国性侵案，核心成员相继落网。
zh.papers_summary: 虽然没有优先语言论文，但英文论文涉及AI辅助犯罪关联分析、中国传统绘画可视化等前沿研究。

todays_image.caption: Like Lobophora sp. uses chemical defenses to survive in its environment, humans must now wage chemical warfare against the tick invasion.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
